claims.quote: Join Our Team!Careers at Sarasota Memorial Health Care SystemOne of the largest public health systems in Florida, Sarasota Memorial Health Care System is a full-service public health system
claims.claimText: Sarasota Memorial Health Care System operates a public careers portal for the health system.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Top-level careers portal landing page covering hospital-wide employment — Tier 3 practice/career.
claims.limitations: No physician-specific or visa-sponsorship language stated on this page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Experienced Registered Nurses:Join our SMH Venice Team NOW!
claims.claimText: Recruiting callout for experienced Registered Nurses at the SMH Venice campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Experienced-RN recruiting callout — Tier 3 post-training employment, not USCE.
claims.limitations: Nursing recruitment; not within physician USCE scope but logged as future-lane signal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: all individuals providing care to vulnerable populations are required to undergo background screening through The Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse
claims.claimText: All care providers to vulnerable populations must complete background screening via the Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Background-screening requirement applies to anyone providing care at the system, including employed clinicians — a Tier 3 onboarding requirement.
claims.limitations: Statement is system-wide; does not call out trainees or visiting learners specifically.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on program list and recruiting callouts; missed the eligibility/credentialing sentence buried inside the system description paragraph.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: staffed by Sarasota Memorial’s widening range of fellowship-trained oncology specialists and subspecialists and support clinicians with groundbreaking innovations and research
claims.claimText: Jellison Cancer Institute is staffed by fellowship-trained oncology specialists and subspecialists, signaling subspecialty physician roles.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes staffing model with fellowship-trained subspecialist attendings — Tier 3 practice/career signal, not a training program.
claims.limitations: Descriptive marketing language, not a job posting; no specific physician opening or sponsorship policy stated.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the residency/fellowship index but missed the embedded clinician-staffing description inside the cancer-institute marketing paragraph.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Click below for opportunities within our Baycare HomeCare health division.
claims.claimText: Careers portal also surfaces opportunities within the Baycare HomeCare health division.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Identifies an additional employment division within the system — Tier 3 careers signal.
claims.limitations: No specific roles or physician-relevant detail stated on this page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the top-level careers blurb but skipped the secondary callout linking to the BayCare HomeCare division.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Join our Talent CommunityWelcome, we're glad you are here. Join us in 30 seconds so our recruiters can find you.
claims.claimText: Sarasota Memorial operates a Talent Community signup for candidates to be contacted by recruiters.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Recruiter-facing talent pool intake — Tier 3 career-stage funnel.
claims.limitations: Generic intake; no physician-specific or visa-sponsorship statement.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on programmatic listings and did not log the recruiter-funnel call-to-action.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only
